text:

Shar is broken: 
x - xbone/files/customized-ports/devel/p5-File-CounterFile/pkg/COMMENT 
xbone.shar: 399: Syntax error: Illegal eof marker for << redirection 

Maybe because of the long filename. 

Please resubmit, I suggest via an uuencoded tar.gz
